description_long: This is a compact, rectangular toaster with rounded edges and a two-tone color scheme featuring a matte yellow body and a silver-gray top. The front panel is equipped with three circular buttons and a large, round dial, all set within a vertical black strip, suggesting user controls for browning and function selection. The top surface features two wide, parallel toast slots with visible internal grates for holding bread slices. The sides and back are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the appliance's clean, modern design. The base is black, likely made of a heat-resistant material, and slightly raised to provide stability. No visible brand logo or power cord is present, and the crumb tray is not externally visible.
description: A modern, yellow and silver toaster with two wide slots and a front control panel featuring buttons and a dial. Its smooth, rounded design and clean lines give it a contemporary look.
description_view_0: The left side of the toaster, showing a smooth yellow surface with no visible controls or features.
description_view_1: The front view displays the control panel with three buttons and a large dial, as well as the two toast slots on top.
description_view_2: The right side, mirroring the left, is a plain yellow surface without controls or openings.
description_view_3: The back view reveals a seamless silver and yellow surface with no visible controls, slots, or cord.
attribute_control_knobs: One large round dial and three small circular buttons on the front vertical black strip; no visible labeling or markings.
attribute_toast_slots: Two wide, parallel slots on the top, evenly spaced, with visible internal grates.
